name: ExtensionPlanDefinition_Action_LinkId
title: R5: Unique id for the action in the PlanDefinition (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PlanDefinition.action.linkId` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PlanDefinition.action.linkId` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PlanDefinition.action.linkId` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PlanDefinition.action.linkId` has a context of PlanDefinition.action based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PlanDefinition`.
Element `PlanDefinition.action.linkId` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Unique id for the action in the PlanDefinition (new)
element.comment:
Element `PlanDefinition.action.linkId` has a context of PlanDefinition.action based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PlanDefinition`.
Element `PlanDefinition.action.linkId` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Unique id for the action in the PlanDefinition
element.definition: An identifier that is unique within the PlanDefinition to allow linkage within the realized CarePlan and/or RequestOrchestration.
